contentPattern.structure: logo + heading + copy + secondary button (left) + product image (right)

suitableFor: light-background two-column partner/product promos with a secondary CTA button
informational promo callouts pairing copy with a product image (no lead form)
notSuitableFor: accent/red lead-capture CTAs with a zip form (use columns-agent-cta)
plain image + heading + description category rows (use columns-category)
